title: Mow My World
description:
Mow It. Plow It. Tow It. Fly It.Mow My World puts modular CCBOT robots to work across Earth, the Moon, and Mars. Take on service jobs, upgrade your fleet, build your own places, and switch into AirMode when the job calls for a view from above.

Mow, Plow & TowCut lunar grass, clear snow on Mars, and haul cargo across Earth. Each job gives your robot a different purpose, from clean service routes to heavy-duty work across changing terrain.

Take Off With AirModeWhen the ground is not enough, deploy AirMode. Lift off, scout the map, line up your next route, and capture cinematic shots of your robot at work from above.

Weather, Light & Off-World AtmosphereClear days, night work, snow, rain, lunar sunrise, and dusty Martian skies change the feeling of every job. Turn on your robot lights and keep working when the world gets dark.

Real Maps Become PlayableEnter a supported address and turn a real-world place into a playable work site. Mow lawns and save neighborhoods you want to revisit.

Visit Landmarks Across WorldsTake your robot to hand-built landmark scenes across Earth, the Moon, and Mars. These scenic places are made for exploration, AirMode, and cinematic service jobs.

Practice Before The JobJump into practice areas to test modules, learn controls, try AirMode, and get comfortable before taking on real map jobs. The last but not the least, use blocks to build, test, and play your own creations.
description_short: Mow My World is a free-to-play modular robotic platform sandbox where you mow lawns, clear snow, tow cargo, fly in AirMode, build with blocks, and explore landmarks across Earth, the Moon, and Mars. Load real-world maps, save neighborhoods, and turn public places into playable communities.
